calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-284 Phase 3 staleness accumulator diagnostic (online arm + MECH-269 hysteresis swap)
items.note: Phase 3 substrate-readiness diagnostic. OFF vs ON (full V_s circuit Phase 1+2+3 online arm) x 2 seeds x 6 episodes x 200 steps. Metrics: freeze_recommit_count, anchor_reset_count, mean_staleness_peak, action_class_entropy. PASS = anchor_reset_count(ON) >= 2 AND freeze_recommit_count(ON) < OFF in 2/2 seeds. Substrate validation only; four-arm MECH-287 x MECH-284 dissociation is V3-EXQ-476.
